text: Morning Jarvis, help me plan my day. What's on the calendar?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Wednesday, May 28. You have sprint planning at 10 AM, and Lily needs to be picked up from daycare.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has scheduling portal. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That sounds critical. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping scheduling portal in the MVP. I'll save this reasoning in our engineering scratchpad.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! Toddlers are full of energy. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Tracking my weekly fitness metrics. I hit 18 miles of running this week. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've logged your vitals. Great progress! The consistent stretching is keeping you stable. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Got it, Mike. Great update. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. His curiosity is really impressive.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that sarah and I are looking at home listings in Frisco online. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. I can run some projections for you. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has billing integration. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. I checked the recent logs for that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping billing integration in the MVP. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Just wanted to mention that just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. Greg Holloway wants to drop patient onboarding to save time, but Anika thinks it is essential. I want to discuss this with you before the sync.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. That sounds critical. I suggest a phased rollout. Shipping a basic version of patient onboarding now and iterating later is a good compromise. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Sarah and I are discussing screen-time rules for the kids. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that managing some allergy issues today. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Health has to be a priority.
title: Health Update

text: Logged that. Sleep quality is so important. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick update: Helping Ethan with his homework tonight. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. Great update. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. Let me know if he needs any more help.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Calculating some savings estimates. Researching the tax benefits of the Texas 529 plan. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Understood. I've compiled the spreadsheet numbers. 529 plans offer great tax-free growth. I've archived the plan details. I'll archive the documentation.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Analyzing the system logs from yesterday's release. I am negotiating my senior PM salary and signing the Vertex Health offer letter. We need to get this sorted before the Baylor pilot starts.
title: Work Update

text: Understood. That sounds critical. Negotiation is key. Ensure the relocation package covers the Chicago to Frisco move. We should review this with Greg tomorrow morning.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Made good progress on my work tasks today. CareConnect prep is moving along. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
